R f ^ i , SR^TT STRTO sreit *TFf, ^ f^cfr 1 srrgjra", tjtf fcwfr ^ F R FFFT, ^nVr w^r, t r e w f s r s M t o ehr, ^i fcrcfT 1 FT. ^t. ^TFT ^rf^r, •?mfr R*I«H, ftwfr -HRICIM<I, ^ fo^rr 1 ^ r - ^rf^r, STORFT, tnnfr R * m ftrFT 1 ^ T - ^ f c r , >HIHM JT5TRFT f^TFT (*W«|4|), - i l ^ WETFTT 5P5T f ^ T T W R ctfr f ^ T T VluiM^ *f Mchl^Hiaf | •HFJFR, ?Tgfr ft^RT ft^TFT, ftrcfr ^REPR | T J i T - R ^ I * (*SIFTT*T PJ<W4J -- 4 of 8 -- (To be published in Delhi Gazette Extra Ordinary Part - IV) Government of National Capital Territory of Delhi (Urban Development Department) Dated the .7:1. ].P.l(....2017 Notification No.F.1/44/ADLB/2017/CD000436606/$"OT~ °\°) - Whereas State Election Commission of National Capital Territory of Delhi and Union Territory of Chandigarh has delimited the wards of North Delhi Municipal Corporation vide its Notification No., F.7(55)/DLB/2015/Pt. I/202 dated 13th January 2017. Consequent upon the same, the ward name, number and the boundaries have also changed. Therefore, in exercise of powers conferred by section 3A of the Delhi Municipal Corporation Act, 1957 (66 of 1957 ), the Lt. Governor of the National Capital Territory of Delhi is pleased to amend the Fourteenth Schedule in respect of North Delhi Municipal Corporation annexed to the said Act as follows. For the Fourteenth Schedule, the following schedule shall be substituted, namely:- "The Fourteenth Schedule (See Section 3A) The N a m e , Area and Limits of Corporations s.
